post.subject: Shag
post.body:
Went to the limelight with Christine last night. All in all it was a pretty good night. I got there a bit early and met some 'friends' from my old school so had a drink with them then went to the limelight at about 10:30. Its quite good having 3 bars open, but can be very confusing deciding which one to stay in and following people between each one, eventually all the different music from each just merges into one.

I had weird dreams last night, and woke up £1300 richer :)

Im definately going to go easy. I have just spent £35 on play.com (I just cant help it). I bought 
The Killers - Hot Fuss
Matchbox 20's latest DVD and
Tin Tin Box Set.

I still have £50 of vouchers for HMV and Virgin. The only other thing Im going to spend my money on is upgrading my computer (about £200) then Im determined to make it last! 

Im a little happier now than I was yesterday anyway, not that money means everything, but of course it helps, still all those underlying problems still there...

comments.body:
Hey Sweetie, Shag is RIP on a Tuesday night now
Tis now and forever more (or at least until they get bored) called Menage a trois.

Chris
comments.author: chrissyk_lotn
